'''Merc Sunlet''' was a [[Human/Legends|human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] thief from [[Tirac Munda]]. Skilled in multiple languages, Sunlet was often hired by the wealthy for advice on how to keep their own property safe.<ref name="Customizable Card Game" /> In the year [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]], Sunlet was present in [[Chalmun's Spaceport Cantina/Legends|Chalmun's Spaceport Cantina]], and stood near the bar. While he was there, he was witness to a fight between [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] and a notorious villain known as [[Doctor/Legends|Doctor]] [[Cornelius Evazan/Legends|Evazan]]. Sometime after this event, he was having a conversation with [[Gela Yeens]], who worked for gangster [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba The Hutt]]. Concurrently, Kenobi and his [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|young companion]] fled the Cantina, after two [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Stormtrooper/Legends|Stormtroopers]] began searching for them.<ref name="ANH" />

==Personality and traits==
Sunlet was described as a crafty purloiner with a heart of gold.<ref name="Customizable Card Game" /> He was a [[Human/Legends|human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] with [[Color/Legends|graying]] hair and fair skin.<ref name="ANH" />

==Skills and abilities==
Sunlet was well traveled and skilled in many langauges.<ref name="Customizable Card Game" />

==Behind the scenes==
Merc Sunlet first appeared as in the [[Chalmun's Spaceport Cantina/Legends|Cantina]] scene of [[Star Wars: Episode IV A New Hope|''Star Wars'': Episode IV ''A New Hope'']], though he is seen very briefly.<ref name="ANH" /> Although uncredited, he was played by propsman [[Ted Western]].<ref name="TedWesternConGuestsInterview">{{YouTube|video=V31UpZJE5vc|text=Ted Western Merc Sunlet|channel=@ConGuests|name=ConGuests|quote=Ted Western worked on Star Wars ANH as a Props Man and was dressing the Cantina set when they worked out they didn't have enough people... he ended up being in shot as the character Merc Sunlet!}}</ref> Sunlet was later identified and given a brief backstory in the ''[[A New Hope Limited]]'' expansion set of the [[Star Wars Customizable Card Game|''Star Wars'' Customizable Card Game]], released in [[1996]].<ref name="Customizable Card Game" />
